title: MCP tools for pseudo rescan and rerank operations
purpose: Provides tools to trigger full scans, incremental scans, drift checks, and reranking of project data.
module_context: Exports two main functions: pseudo_rescan for triggering various types of scans and pseudo_rerank for updating rankings based on project data.

steps.content: Initialize the pseudo database handle for the given project.
IF cancellation is requested, invoke the indexer cancel method and return a cancellation status.
Determine the scan mode, defaulting to 'full' if not specified.
IF the mode is 'full', initiate a full scan and return its status and run ID.
ELSE IF the mode is 'incremental', perform an incremental scan with specified paths and return its status and run ID.
ELSE IF the mode is 'drift_check', execute a drift check and return the results.
ELSE return an error status indicating an unknown mode.
IF any operation fails, return an error status with the error message.
Initialize the pseudo database handle for the given project.
IF cancellation is requested, invoke the indexer cancel method and return a cancellation message.
Execute the ranking update process using the database and specified parameters.
IF the ranking update succeeds, return the number of updated rows.
IF the ranking update fails, return an error status with the error message.
